creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Tue, 28 Sep 1999, Slaven Rezic wrote:

> 	> mkdir foo
> 	> mkfifo foo/bar
> 	> zip -r foo.zip foo
> 	  adding: foo/ (stored 0%)
> 	  adding: foo/bar^C
> 
> >Fix:

We don't fix normally bugs in third-party code. Please submit your bug
report to the author of the port in question (unless you have an interim
patch).

Kris
